《明史简述》为吴晗在中央高级党校所做学术讲演的讲稿记录，详细阐明了明史研究中的基本和关键问题；《明代政治军事与社会》收录了吴晗一生中解读明王朝的核心文章，特别包含了其对明代恐怖政治、朱元璋统治策略等命题的深入探讨；《明代人物》则深刻再现了明代历史上的代表性人物，以点带面，通过生动的人物刻画，全面理解明代的政治特点和社会风习。
历史是一面镜子，纵览明朝大历史，还原你心中真实的大明影像。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b43916e9fa46a875b6b2b853e6eceb24~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吴晗","author_id":"","book_id":"7120541135793032206","book_name":"明朝大历史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b81038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476036822905146393","read_count":"132","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"195749"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"28","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b43916e9fa46a875b6b2b853e6eceb24~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181961&x-signature=pmid5W8oAXtb7VKPoSXzgFGNF38%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171241870C7F71E0471A28A81E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5224,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6375,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":101},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577412759535665982","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"知识很全面，通俗易懂，适合历史科普知识"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764256152,"group_id":"7120541135793032206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大唐王朝镇国太平公主
